stories.title: Core Middleware Pipeline
stories.description: Port Oxygen's higher-order function middleware composition pattern. Middleware signature: handler::Function -> (req -> response). Composition via reduce(|>, [router, mw1, mw2, ...]). Support application-level middleware passed to serve()/dev() via middleware kwarg. Adapt for HTTP.Stream handler (Therapy uses stream-based handler, not just HTTP.Request).
stories.completedNote: Implemented compose_middleware() and write_response() in src/Server/Middleware.jl. Faithful port of Oxygen's reduce(|>) pattern with reverse() for left-to-right execution order. 21 tests passing including 3 real HTTP server tests.

stories.title: CorsMiddleware
stories.description: Port Oxygen's CorsMiddleware. Config: allowed_origins, allowed_headers, allowed_methods, allow_credentials, max_age. On OPTIONS: return 200 with CORS headers (preflight). On other methods: call handler, append CORS headers to response.
stories.completedNote: Implemented CorsMiddleware() in Middleware.jl. Faithful port of Oxygen's Cors() — preflight 200, CORS headers on all responses. 26 tests including 2 real HTTP server tests.

stories.title: RateLimiterMiddleware
stories.description: Port Oxygen's RateLimiter with fixed window strategy. Config: rate_limit (max requests), window (seconds). Track requests per IP using Dict{String, Tuple{Int, Float64}} with ReentrantLock. Set headers: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset, Retry-After. Return 429 when limit exceeded.
stories.completedNote: Implemented RateLimiterMiddleware() in Middleware.jl. Fixed window strategy with ReentrantLock, IP extraction from proxy headers (X-Forwarded-For, X-Real-IP, CF-Connecting-IP), standard rate limit headers. 44 tests including window reset, per-IP tracking, CORS stacking.

stories.title: BearerAuthMiddleware
stories.description: Port Oxygen's BearerAuth. Config: validate_token function, header name, scheme. Extract token from Authorization header, call validate_token(token). On success: attach user info to request context, call handler. On failure: return 401.

stories.title: API Route Support
stories.description: Extend file-based routing to support API routes. Files in routes/api/ return Dict of method handlers instead of VNodes. Dict keys are HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE). Each handler receives (req, params). Responses are auto-serialized to JSON. Support status codes and custom headers.

stories.title: WebSocket Path Routing
stories.description: Port Oxygen's websocket registration as plain function. websocket(path, handler) registers a WebSocket route. Handler receives WebSocket object. Multiple WS paths supported (not just /ws). Integrate with stream_handler's upgrade detection.

stories.title: Parameterized WebSocket Paths
stories.description: Support dynamic segments in WebSocket paths: websocket('/ws/room/{id}', handler). Handler receives (ws, params). Reuse Router.jl pattern matching for WS routes.

stories.title: Channel/Room Subscriptions
stories.description: Make Sessions.jl's MESSAGE_CHANNELS + on_channel_message pattern a first-class Therapy feature. subscribe(conn, channel), unsubscribe(conn, channel), broadcast_channel(channel, msg). This replaces the monkey-patching pattern.

stories.title: Integration Tests
stories.description: Full integration test combining middleware + API routes + WebSocket routing. Real HTTP server, real requests, verify all features work together.
